summary: Tested all 7 mobile UX bug fixes on Bloom platform (Czech). All tests passed on mobile viewport 390x844 and desktop 1280x800. Logged in as test1@bloom.cz/test123.
critical_code_review_comments: Navigation.js: Code is clean. mobileMenuRef + mobileToggleRef correctly prevent false-close on toggle button. useEffect listens for both mousedown and touchstart (passive) for mobile compatibility. scroll handler on window correctly fires setMobileMenuOpen(false).
MessagesPage.js: Line 191 correctly uses calc(100dvh - 200px) which Tailwind emits as calc(-200px + 100dvh) — verified via browser DOM inspection.
Search panel: uses 'fixed sm:absolute inset-x-2 sm:inset-x-auto top-[59px] sm:top-full' — confirmed panel appears at x=8, right=382 on 390px viewport (8px margins each side), fully on-screen.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 mobile UX bug fixes are working correctly. Test 1 (outside tap close), Test 2 (search icon tap close), Test 3 (avatar tap close), Test 4 (scroll close), Test 5 (search panel visible at x=8 right=382 on 390px viewport with 8px inset-x-2 margins), Test 6 (dvh: calc(-200px + 100dvh)), Test 7 (desktop header height=60px stable before and after dropdown). No regressions found.

detailed_results.test_1_menu_close_outside_tap: PASS - Menu opened, clicked at (200,400) page content, menu closed
detailed_results.test_2_menu_close_search_icon: PASS - Menu opened, clicked search-icon-btn, menu closed
detailed_results.test_3_menu_close_avatar: PASS - Menu opened, clicked user-menu-trigger, menu closed
detailed_results.test_4_menu_close_scroll: PASS - Menu opened, window.scrollBy(0,100), menu closed
detailed_results.test_5_search_panel_visibility: PASS - Panel at x=8, y=59, w=374, h=64 on 390px viewport (8px left margin, 8px right margin, no clipping)
detailed_results.test_6_messages_dvh: PASS - Grid style is calc(-200px + 100dvh) which contains dvh
detailed_results.test_7_desktop_header_stability: PASS - Header at x=0,y=0,w=1280,h=60 before AND after dropdown open (0px shift)
